title: --restart=on-failure does not work
body:
### Issue Description

I have a user container that has a restart policy of on-failure, but it seems to not restart container. Container exited with code 143

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a user container to produce code 143 with on-failure restart policy
2. See that it does not restart


### Describe the results you received

container does not restart

### Describe the results you expected

for container to restart

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
```
216ad9f0c6e8  docker.io/itzg/minecraft-server:java17                        17 minutes ago  Exited (143) 13 minutes ago  0.0.0.0:25565->25565/tcp, 25565/tcp  prominence-test
``` 
see exited 143
Ah it looks like i just forgot to enable lingering so the user sesssion won't close when i exit ssh, my bad
Still happens even after i enabled linger turns out, container exited with code 1
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Please provide an exact reproducer, how is the container run?

This works fine:
```
$ podman run --restart on-failure -d  quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 sh -c 'sleep 1; exit 143'

...
$ bin/podman ps -a
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                              COMMAND               CREATED         STATUS       PORTS       NAMES
a4fbaade6a08  quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123  sh -c sleep 1; ex...  33 seconds ago  Up 1 second              vibrant_hermann
$ bin/podman ps -a
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                              COMMAND               CREATED         STATUS                     PORTS       NAMES
a4fbaade6a08  quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123  sh -c sleep 1; ex...  33 seconds ago  Exited (143) 1 second ago              vibrant_hermann
$ bin/podman ps -a
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                              COMMAND               CREATED         STATUS                 PORTS       NAMES
a4fbaade6a08  quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123  sh -c sleep 1; ex...  35 seconds ago  Up Less than a second              vibrant_hermann
